_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 13:05. 6 domain-projections: marine biology, botany, forensic science, photonics, pediatrics, mechanism design. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
marine_biology_through_tig: Marine biology studies operator-LATTICE-of-life-in-saltwater; from coastal tide pools to deep ocean trenches.
Ocean zones are operator-LATTICE-by-depth; epipelagic mesopelagic bathypelagic abyssopelagic hadopelagic each have distinct LATTICE.
Plankton are operator-DRIFTERS-AT-BASE-OF-FOOD-WEB; phytoplankton (cyanobacteria diatoms dinoflagellates) plus zooplankton.
Coral reef is operator-LATTICE-of-coral-and-symbionts; calcium-carbonate skeleton plus zooxanthellae HARMONY-photosynthesis.
Marine ecosystem is operator-LATTICE-of-organism-environment-interactions; coastal pelagic benthic each have characteristic communities.
Marine food web is operator-LATTICE-of-trophic-levels; primary producers (plankton) consumers (small fish) higher predators (sharks orcas).
Deep sea is operator-EXTREME-LATTICE; high pressure cold dark hydrothermal vents support chemosynthetic life.
Marine mammals are operator-AIR-BREATHING-VERTEBRATES; cetaceans (whales dolphins) sirenians (manatees) pinnipeds (seals sea lions).
Ocean acidification is operator-CO2-DRIVEN-pH-COLLAPSE; carbonic acid lowers pH dissolves coral and shell-building organism LATTICE.
Biodiversity in oceans is operator-RICHNESS-LATTICE; coral reefs and continental shelves richest, deep sea has unique endemism.
Biogeography traces operator-DISTRIBUTION-PATTERNS; tagged organisms tracked across migrations and lifecycles.
botany_through_tig: Botany is operator-study of plants; algae mosses ferns gymnosperms angiosperms across LATTICE-of-clades.
Photosynthesis is operator-CHAOS-INTO-LATTICE; light energy plus CO2 plus H2O produces glucose plus O2 (fundamental autotrophic PROGRESS).
Chlorophyll is operator-LIGHT-ABSORBING-PIGMENT; chlorophyll a (primary) and b (in plants and green algae) absorb red and blue.
Plant cell wall is operator-RIGID-OUTER-LATTICE; cellulose pectin xyloglucan polysaccharides give structural support.
Vascular plant is operator-WATER-AND-NUTRIENT-TRANSPORT-LATTICE; xylem (up) phloem (around) ~391000 species.
Root is operator-ANCHOR-AND-ABSORBER; underground structure pulls water and minerals from soil.
Stem is operator-SUPPORT-AND-CONDUIT; above-ground holds leaves to light, transports through xylem and phloem.
Leaf is operator-LIGHT-COLLECTOR-AND-GAS-EXCHANGER; specialized for photosynthesis with stomata controlling water and CO2.
Flower is operator-REPRODUCTIVE-STRUCTURE in angiosperms; petals sepals stamens carpels facilitate pollination HARMONY.
Pollen is operator-MALE-GAMETOPHYTE; microscopic grains carry sperm cells, dispersed by wind insects animals.
Seed is operator-EMBRYO-PLUS-RESERVES-PLUS-COAT; dormant package ready for germination when conditions right.
forensic_science_through_tig: Forensic science is operator-APPLICATION-OF-SCIENCE-TO-LAW; evidence collection analysis interpretation for criminal cases.
Chain of custody is operator-EVIDENCE-INTEGRITY-LATTICE; documentation from collection through court ensures admissibility.
Crime scene investigation is operator-EVIDENCE-COLLECTION-PROTOCOL; secure document collect preserve transport without contamination.
DNA analysis is operator-GENETIC-IDENTIFICATION; STR loci compared between sample and reference yields probability matching.
Fingerprinting is operator-RIDGE-PATTERN-LATTICE; loops whorls arches plus minutiae give individual unique pattern.
Ballistics is operator-PROJECTILE-MOTION-AND-MARKINGS; barrel rifling leaves unique striations linking bullet to firearm.
Forensic toxicology is operator-DETECTION-OF-DRUGS-POISONS; biological samples analyzed by GC-MS LC-MS for cause-of-death.
Forensic pathology is operator-CAUSE-OF-DEATH-DETERMINATION; autopsy combined with circumstances determines manner.
Autopsy is operator-EXAMINATION-OF-DECEASED; external internal organ-by-organ documents injuries disease state.
Trace evidence is operator-MICROSCOPIC-PHYSICAL-MATERIALS; fibers glass paint hair gunshot residue link suspect to scene.
Expert witness is operator-COURT-TESTIFIER; qualified specialist testifies under cross-examination about findings.
photonics_through_tig: Photonics is operator-engineering-with-photons; generation manipulation detection of light for technology.
Laser is operator-COHERENT-LIGHT-SOURCE; stimulated emission produces narrow-spectrum collimated phase-locked beam.
Optical fiber is operator-WAVEGUIDE-FOR-LIGHT; total internal reflection carries signal over 100+ km in glass core.
Photodetector is operator-LIGHT-TO-ELECTRICAL-SIGNAL; photodiodes APDs solar cells each suit different speed-sensitivity LATTICE.
LED is operator-SEMICONDUCTOR-LIGHT-SOURCE; electron-hole recombination across band gap emits photons of corresponding wavelength.
Photonic crystal is operator-LATTICE-WITH-PHOTONIC-BAND-GAP; periodic dielectric structure controls light propagation as crystal does electrons.
Nonlinear optics is operator-INTENSITY-DEPENDENT-RESPONSE; second-harmonic generation Kerr effect parametric amplification require strong fields.
Quantum optics studies operator-QUANTUM-PROPERTIES-OF-LIGHT; photon statistics squeezed states entanglement underlie many technologies.
Optical computing uses operator-PHOTONS-INSTEAD-OF-ELECTRONS; potential bandwidth advantage limited by need for nonlinear gates.
Integrated photonics combines operator-MULTIPLE-OPTICAL-FUNCTIONS-on-chip; modulators detectors waveguides on silicon-photonic platform.
Modulator encodes operator-INFORMATION-ON-LIGHT; intensity phase polarization modulation for fiber-optic communication.
pediatrics_through_tig: Pediatrics is operator-medicine-of-children; from neonate through adolescence with attention to growth and development.
Growth and development is operator-LATTICE-of-changes-with-age; physical cognitive social emotional milestones trackable on standard curves.
Vaccination schedule is operator-LATTICE-of-timed-immunizations; CDC schedule from birth through adolescence builds protective immunity.
Common pediatric infections include operator-LATTICE: otitis media URI viral exanthems gastroenteritis UTI strep pharyngitis.
Congenital disease is operator-DEVELOPMENTAL-DISRUPTION; structural genetic chromosomal teratogenic each cause distinct presentations.
Pediatric pharmacology accounts for operator-DEVELOPMENTAL-DIFFERENCES; absorption distribution metabolism elimination differ from adult.
Neonatology is operator-NEWBORN-CARE specialty; NICU manages prematurity respiratory distress congenital problems.
Adolescent medicine addresses operator-PUBERTY-THROUGH-EARLY-ADULTHOOD; mental health sexual health substance use specific concerns.
Breastfeeding is operator-OPTIMAL-INFANT-NUTRITION; passive immunity maternal bond cognitive benefits well-documented HARMONY.
Well-child visit is operator-PERIODIC-PREVENTIVE-EXAM; growth check development assessment immunization anticipatory guidance.
Developmental milestones are operator-LATTICE-OF-EXPECTED-ACHIEVEMENTS; gross motor fine motor language social by age intervals.
mechanism_design_through_tig: Mechanism design is operator-REVERSE-GAME-THEORY; design rules so equilibrium achieves designer's goal.
Implementation is operator-RULE-DESIGN that achieves desired outcome; agents respond strategically to incentives.
Incentive compatibility is operator-TRUTHFUL-REPORTING optimal; agents find honest disclosure their best strategy.
Individual rationality is operator-VOLUNTARY-PARTICIPATION; agents must receive enough utility to choose to participate.
Revelation principle: operator-EVERY-MECHANISM-EQUIVALENT to direct truthful mechanism; simplifies design space (Myerson Gibbard).
Vickrey auction is operator-SECOND-PRICE-SEALED-BID; highest bidder wins pays second-highest bid, truthful bidding dominant.
Dominant strategy is operator-OPTIMAL-REGARDLESS of others; strategy-proof mechanism makes truthfulness always best.
Optimal mechanism maximizes operator-DESIGNER-OBJECTIVE subject to IC and IR constraints; revenue-optimal auction (Myerson 1981).
Social choice function maps operator-PREFERENCES-TO-OUTCOMES; aggregates individual rankings into collective decision.
Arrow impossibility theorem: operator-NO-VOTING-SYSTEM satisfies all desirable democratic axioms simultaneously (1951).
Gibbard-Satterthwaite theorem: operator-NO-NON-DICTATORIAL strategy-proof voting rule for >=3 alternatives.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 132 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design pure mathematics meta-mathematics CS depth Eastern philosophy historical disciplines medical specialties and reverse-game-theory mechanism design.
The lens is genuinely universal; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
